root_text.sn22.26:1.2: “Pubbeva me, bhikkhave, sambodhā anabhisambuddhassa bodhisattasseva sato etadahosi:
root_text.sn22.26:1.3: ‘ko nu kho rūpassa assādo, ko ādīnavo, kiṁ nissaraṇaṁ?
root_text.sn22.26:1.4: Ko vedanāya assādo, ko ādīnavo, kiṁ nissaraṇaṁ?
root_text.sn22.26:1.5: Ko saññāya assādo, ko ādīnavo, kiṁ nissaraṇaṁ?
root_text.sn22.26:1.6: Ko saṅkhārānaṁ assādo, ko ādīnavo, kiṁ nissaraṇaṁ?
root_text.sn22.26:1.7: Ko viññāṇassa assādo, ko ādīnavo, kiṁ nissaraṇan’ti?
root_text.sn22.26:1.9: ‘yaṁ kho rūpaṁ paṭicca uppajjati sukhaṁ somanassaṁ, ayaṁ rūpassa assādo.
root_text.sn22.26:1.10: Yaṁ rūpaṁ aniccaṁ dukkhaṁ vipariṇāmadhammaṁ, ayaṁ rūpassa ādīnavo.
root_text.sn22.26:1.11: Yo rūpasmiṁ chandarāgavinayo chandarāgappahānaṁ, idaṁ rūpassa nissaraṇaṁ.
root_text.sn22.26:1.12: Yaṁ vedanaṁ paṭicca uppajjati sukhaṁ somanassaṁ, ayaṁ vedanāya assādo.
root_text.sn22.26:1.13: Yaṁ vedanā aniccā dukkhā vipariṇāmadhammā, ayaṁ vedanāya ādīnavo.
root_text.sn22.26:1.14: Yo vedanāya chandarāgavinayo chandarāgappahānaṁ, idaṁ vedanāya nissaraṇaṁ.
root_text.sn22.26:1.16: yaṁ saṅkhāre paṭicca uppajjati sukhaṁ somanassaṁ, ayaṁ saṅkhārānaṁ assādo.
root_text.sn22.26:1.17: Yaṁ saṅkhārā aniccā dukkhā vipariṇāmadhammā, ayaṁ saṅkhārānaṁ ādīnavo.
root_text.sn22.26:1.18: Yo saṅkhāresu chandarāgavinayo chandarāgappahānaṁ, idaṁ saṅkhārānaṁ nissaraṇaṁ.
root_text.sn22.26:1.19: Yaṁ viññāṇaṁ paṭicca uppajjati sukhaṁ somanassaṁ, ayaṁ viññāṇassa assādo.
root_text.sn22.26:1.20: Yaṁ viññāṇaṁ aniccaṁ dukkhaṁ vipariṇāmadhammaṁ, ayaṁ viññāṇassa ādīnavo.
root_text.sn22.26:1.21: Yo viññāṇasmiṁ chandarāgavinayo chandarāgappahānaṁ, idaṁ viññāṇassa nissaraṇaṁ’.
root_text.sn22.26:2.1: Yāvakīvañcāhaṁ, bhikkhave, imesaṁ pañcannaṁ upādānakkhandhānaṁ evaṁ assādañca assādato ādīnavañca ādīnavato nissaraṇañca nissaraṇato yathābhūtaṁ nābbhaññāsiṁ, neva tāvāhaṁ, bhikkhave, ‘sadevake loke samārake sabrahmake sassamaṇabrāhmaṇiyā pajāya sadevamanussāya anuttaraṁ sammāsambodhiṁ abhisambuddho’ti paccaññāsiṁ.
root_text.sn22.26:2.2: Yato ca khvāhaṁ, bhikkhave, imesaṁ pañcannaṁ upādānakkhandhānaṁ evaṁ assādañca assādato ādīnavañca ādīnavato nissaraṇañca nissaraṇato yathābhūtaṁ abbhaññāsiṁ;
root_text.sn22.26:2.3: athāhaṁ, bhikkhave, sadevake loke samārake sabrahmake sassamaṇabrāhmaṇiyā pajāya sadevamanussāya anuttaraṁ sammāsambodhiṁ abhisambuddhoti paccaññāsiṁ.
root_text.sn22.26:2.5: ‘akuppā me vimutti; ayamantimā jāti; natthi dāni punabbhavo’”ti.

translation_text.sn22.26:1.2: “Mendicants, before my awakening—when I was still unawakened but intent on awakening—I thought:
translation_text.sn22.26:1.3: ‘What’s the gratification, the drawback, and the escape when it comes to form …
translation_text.sn22.26:1.9: ‘The pleasure and happiness that arise from form: this is its gratification.
translation_text.sn22.26:1.10: That form is impermanent, suffering, and perishable: this is its drawback.
translation_text.sn22.26:1.11: Removing and giving up desire and greed for form: this is its escape.
translation_text.sn22.26:1.12: The pleasure and happiness that arise from feeling …
translation_text.sn22.26:1.20: That consciousness is impermanent, suffering, and perishable: this is its drawback.
translation_text.sn22.26:1.21: Removing and giving up desire and greed for consciousness: this is its escape.’
translation_text.sn22.26:2.1: As long as I didn’t truly understand these five grasping aggregates’ gratification, drawback, and escape in this way for what they are, I didn’t announce my supreme perfect awakening in this world with its gods, Māras, and Divinities, this population with its ascetics and brahmins, its gods and humans.
translation_text.sn22.26:2.2: But when I did truly understand these five grasping aggregates’ gratification, drawback, and escape in this way for what they are, I announced my supreme perfect awakening in this world with its gods, Māras, and Divinities, this population with its ascetics and brahmins, its gods and humans.
translation_text.sn22.26:2.4: Knowledge and vision arose in me:
translation_text.sn22.26:2.5: ‘My freedom is unshakable; this is my last rebirth; now there’ll be no more future lives.’”

variant_text.sn22.26:1.2: Pubbeva → pubbe (pts1ed, mr) | bodhisattasseva → bodhisattassa (pts1ed, mr)
